name: Pasta Di Pina
recipeIngredient: 1 envelope Env. Golden Onion Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the garlic finely.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large pot.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until noodles are cooked through.
4. Stir occasionally to prevent sticking.
5. Drain if necessary.
6. Serve hot with parsley and parmesan.
